title: pelargonium × phoeniceum
intro: Pelargonium × phoeniceum, commonly known as the Red-leaf Geranium, is a hybrid species of the Pelargonium genus, characterized by its bright red or reddish-purple leaves and fragrant flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × phoeniceum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, with some popular preparations including a cold and flu remedy tea and a digestive aid syrup.
